title: List OTC sale tiers for an allowlisted DAO
notes: Phase v0.5.0 — exercises dexe_otc_list_sales_for_dao against the first allowlisted DAO. On testnet (Glacier) the TokenSaleProposal helper is wired but no tiers exist yet; expect tiers: [] and counts.active == 0. Validates the helper-discovery happy path without requiring a live sale.
